summary: Iteration 60 Testing - 3 New Features: (1) Mentor CRM Net Revenue dialog - WORKING, (2) CS Kanban last_upgrade_date badge - WORKING (no data to display), (3) Customer Master Net LTV - WORKING

minor.issue: Sorting by net_ltv doesn't work correctly because net_ltv is computed after DB fetch, not stored in DB. Sort happens at DB level before enrichment.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/mentor/monthly-closings returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: monthly-closings response has month, students, totals fields
Backend: monthly-closings students have student_name, student_email, phone, total_deposit, total_withdrawal
Backend: monthly-closings totals has deposits, withdrawals, net_revenue
Backend: GET /api/students returns students with last_upgrade_date field (when cs_upgrades exist)
Backend: GET /api/customers returns net_ltv, mentor_deposits_total, mentor_withdrawals_total
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id} returns mentor_deposits, mentor_withdrawals, mentor_totals, net_ltv
Backend: net_ltv calculation correct: enrollment + deposits - withdrawals
Frontend: Mentor CRM banner shows Net Active button with data-testid='net-revenue-click'
Frontend: Clicking Net Active opens Monthly Closings dialog with data-testid='monthly-closings-dialog'
Frontend: Dialog shows table with Sr, Name, Email, Mobile, Deposit(AED), Withdrawal(AED), Net(AED) columns
Frontend: Dialog shows totals - Deposits: AED 113,828, Withdrawals: AED 0, Net: AED 113,828
Frontend: Customer Master table has 'Net LTV' column
Frontend: Customer Master detail dialog shows LTV breakdown (Enrollment + Deposits - Withdrawals = Net LTV)
Frontend: Customer detail shows mentor_totals with total_deposits_aed, total_withdrawals_aed
action_items: MINOR: Fix sorting by net_ltv in GET /api/customers - need to sort after enrichment or store net_ltv in DB

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features verified: (1) Mentor CRM Net Active button opens dialog showing monthly closings with deposits/withdrawals per student - API returns 23 students for March 2026 with AED 113,828 deposits. (2) CS Kanban last_upgrade_date badge implemented but no students have cs_upgrades records to display. (3) Customer Master shows Net LTV column and detail dialog with LTV breakdown. 156 customers have mentor deposits. Sample: Munas has net_ltv=7714.13 (6814 enrollment + 900.13 deposits).

cs_last_upgrade_date.note: No students have cs_upgrades records - badge will show when upgrade data exists
